pages.name: Home
pages.description: Landing page for the band, surfacing the latest album, video, next tour date, and featured merch, with direct entry points into Music, Videos, Tour, Store, Blog, Playlists, and Cart.
primary_functions: Provide quick access to main sections: Music, Videos, Tour, Store, Blog, Playlists, and Cart via header navigation
Feature latest releases, upcoming shows, and highlighted products with clear calls to action
Link to newsletter signup via footer for users who scroll to the bottom

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click the "Music" item in the main navigation or the latest album module
Click the "Videos" item in the main navigation or the latest video thumbnail
Click the "Tour" item in the main navigation or the "Next show" call-to-action
Click the "Store" item in the main navigation
Click a featured apparel promo (e.g., "Shop T-Shirts")
Click a featured music promo (e.g., "Shop Vinyl")
Click the "Blog" item in the main navigation
Click the "Playlists" item in the main navigation
Click the Cart icon in the header
Click the "Newsletter" link in the footer
Click the "About & Contact" link in the footer

access_methods.description: Default landing page when visiting the site root and via the "Home" header link
Accessible directly at index.html

pages.name: Store / Catalog
pages.description: Unified catalog for browsing all band merchandise and music, supporting category navigation, filters, sorting, search, and quick add-to-cart.
primary_functions: Browse store categories such as Music, Apparel, and subcategories like T-Shirts and Hoodies
Filter products by attributes including size, format, and price range (e.g., size M, price under 30, vinyl format)
Sort product listings by criteria like Price Low to High or High to Low
Search within store items by keyword such as Midnight Echoes
Open product detail pages from product cards or perform quick add to cart actions

incoming_params.description: Top-level store category to show by default, e.g., 'apparel' or 'music'; used by footer links like Store – Apparel/Music.
Product subtype within a category, e.g., 't_shirt', 'hoodie', 'digital_album', 'vinyl_album'.
Search query text entered into the store search bar, e.g., 'Midnight Echoes'.
Apparel size filter code such as 'm' when searching for size M T-shirts.
Music format filter, e.g., 'vinyl' when viewing only vinyl records.
Lower bound for price range filters.
Upper bound for price range filters such as 30 for T-shirts or 40 for vinyl.
Current sort option, e.g., 'price_asc' (Price: Low to High) or 'price_desc'.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a product card (e.g., a T-shirt, hoodie, vinyl, or album) in the catalog grid/list
Click on the "T-Shirts" subcategory under the Apparel category
Click on the "Hoodies" subcategory under the Apparel category
Select the Music category and apply the Vinyl format filter
Click the Cart icon or "View Cart" button after adding products

access_methods.description: Accessible via the "Store" item in the main navigation
Accessed with pre-filtered categoryId via "Store – Apparel" and "Store – Music" footer links
Filters, search, and sorting states are encoded into the store.html query string

pages.name: Product Detail
pages.description: Detailed view for an individual product (T-shirt, hoodie, digital album, vinyl, etc.) including options and tracklists for music.
primary_functions: Display full product information including title, edition, tracklist (for music), size options, price, and availability
Allow users to select options like size or format and set quantity
Add the selected product to the cart with a single Add to cart action
Provide breadcrumb or back navigation to return to the previous store listing or search results

incoming_params.description: Product ID to display, passed when a user selects an item such as a specific T-shirt, hoodie, vinyl, or digital album.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click the "View Cart" or cart icon after adding the product to the cart
Click breadcrumb link to return to the store listing or search results

access_methods.description: Accessed via product.html?id={productId} when a product is chosen from the store or homepage

pages.name: Cart
pages.description: Cart summary page aggregating all products and ticket items the user is preparing to purchase, with controls for editing the cart before checkout.
primary_functions: Display all items in the cart including T-shirts, hoodies, vinyl, digital albums, and tickets with quantities and prices
Allow users to adjust quantities or remove individual items such as removing a hoodie if the bundle exceeds budget
Show subtotal and estimated total costs so users can verify goals like staying under 100 dollars
Provide actions to continue shopping or proceed to checkout

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click the "Proceed to Checkout" button
Click a generic "Continue Shopping" link
Click a contextual "Add another hoodie" link next to a hoodie line item

access_methods.description: Accessible via the Cart icon / "Cart" link in the main navigation
Linked from product pages, event pages, and mini-cart views

pages.name: Checkout
pages.description: Final purchase step where users review their order, enter billing and delivery details, and place the order for cart contents including merch and tickets.
primary_functions: Display final order summary including selected tickets and merch before purchase
Collect necessary buyer information such as billing and delivery details for digital and physical items
Allow users to confirm and place the order
Provide navigation back to the cart for edits before finalizing

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click "Back to Cart" from the checkout page

access_methods.description: Reached from the Cart page via the "Proceed to Checkout" button

pages.name: Discography / Albums
pages.description: Overview of all band albums and releases, providing entry points into album tracklists for listening and playlist building.
primary_functions: Display all albums in a grid or list with covers and basic info
Allow users to open an album detail page to view the tracklist and durations
Support navigation back to this album grid from album pages when building playlists
Optionally filter or sort albums if the catalog grows large

incoming_params.description: Sorting mode for albums, e.g., 'release_desc' to show the most recent albums first.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on an album cover to open its tracklist

access_methods.description: Accessible as "Music" in the main navigation
Linked from the homepage Music section

pages.name: Album Detail
pages.description: Tracklist view for a specific album, enabling per-track playback and adding tracks into user playlists such as 'Workout Mix'.
primary_functions: Display full tracklist with track names, durations, and album information
Allow playback or preview of individual tracks if available
Provide a track options menu to add individual tracks to existing playlists or create a new playlist such as Workout Mix
Support navigation back to the discography page to select other albums when assembling a playlist

incoming_params.description: Album ID to display, selected from the discography grid, homepage, or a playlist track link.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click the "Back to albums" or breadcrumb link
Click a confirmation link such as "View 'Workout Mix'" after adding tracks to a playlist
Click a "Manage playlists" link from the album page

access_methods.description: Accessed via album.html?id={albumId} from the discography grid or other links

pages.name: Playlists Overview
pages.description: Central overview of all playlists (e.g., Favorites, Workout Mix) with options to create, browse, and open them.
primary_functions: List all available playlists such as Favorites and Workout Mix with basic metadata
Allow users to open a specific playlist detail page
Provide controls to create new playlists from scratch if desired
Offer basic management actions like renaming or deleting playlists

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a playlist tile such as "Favorites" or "Workout Mix"

access_methods.description: Accessible via the "Playlists" item in the main navigation

pages.name: Playlist Detail
pages.description: Detail page for a specific playlist showing contained tracks/videos, with options to play, reorder, and remove items.
primary_functions: Display all tracks in the selected playlist with album source and duration
Allow users to play or shuffle the playlist
Provide controls to remove tracks or reorder them within the playlist
Serve as the destination when users open playlists such as Workout Mix after adding tracks from albums

incoming_params.description: Playlist ID to load, e.g., the 'Workout Mix' or 'Favorites' playlist the user wants to view.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click "Back to Playlists" from the playlist detail page
Click on an album name for a track listed in the playlist
Click on a video item within a mixed media playlist like Favorites

access_methods.description: Accessed via playlist.html?id={playlistId} from the Playlists overview or contextual links

pages.name: Videos Index
pages.description: Index of all published band videos, with sorting and filtering to quickly find the latest music videos or specific types.
primary_functions: Display a list or grid of videos with thumbnails, titles, and release dates
Provide sorting controls such as Release Date Newest First to find the most recent videos
Allow users to filter videos if needed, for example by album or type
Open individual video detail pages when a thumbnail or title is clicked

incoming_params.description: Sorting mode, such as 'release_desc' for Release Date: Newest First.
Optional filter for video type, e.g., 'music_video' or 'live'.
Optional year filter for narrowing video releases.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a video thumbnail or title in the videos grid

access_methods.description: Accessible via the "Videos" item in the main navigation

pages.name: Video Detail
pages.description: Playback page for a single music video, enabling viewing and adding the video into playlists such as Favorites.
primary_functions: Provide a video player with a clear play button to start and control playback
Display video metadata such as title, release date, and description
Offer an Add to playlist or Add to Favorites control that lets users choose an existing playlist like Favorites or create a new one
Confirm successful addition of the video to the chosen playlist

incoming_params.description: Video ID to display, chosen from the Videos index, homepage feature, or a playlist item.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a confirmation link like "View Favorites" after adding the current video to the Favorites playlist

access_methods.description: Accessed via video.html?id={videoId} from the Videos index or other links

pages.name: Tour Dates
pages.description: Listing of upcoming tour and live show dates with filters for location and date ranges to find relevant events.
primary_functions: List all upcoming shows with key details such as city, venue, and date
Provide filters for city or location such as Los Angeles and date range such as August 1 to August 31, 2025
Allow users to sort or refine shows and click into a specific event detail page
Highlight important shows or upcoming legs of the tour

incoming_params.description: City filter for tour events, e.g., 'Los Angeles' when searching for LA shows.
Start date (ISO format) for the events date range filter, e.g., '2025-08-01'.
End date (ISO format) for the events date range filter, e.g., '2025-08-31'.
Whether to limit results to events with tickets currently on sale.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a listed show to open its Event / Show Detail page

access_methods.description: Accessible via the "Tour" item in the main navigation

pages.name: Event / Show Detail
pages.description: Detail page for a single show, including venue info and ticket type selection for purchase.
primary_functions: Display full event information such as date, time, venue, and city
List available ticket types with prices and, if needed, sort them by Price Low to High
Allow users to select a specific ticket type, set the quantity such as two tickets, and add them to the cart or proceed directly to checkout
Show clear calls to action for continuing to checkout or returning to tour dates

incoming_params.description: Event ID of the show to display, selected from the Tour Dates listing or homepage highlight.
Sorting rule for ticket types, e.g., 'price_asc' to show tickets from cheapest to most expensive.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a primary CTA like "Continue to checkout" after selecting ticket type and quantity
Click an alternate CTA such as "View Cart" after adding tickets
Click the "Back to tour dates" link

access_methods.description: Accessed via event.html?id={eventId} when selecting a show from the Tour Dates page or homepage

pages.name: Blog / News Index
pages.description: Blog and news listing page, including Tour Diary entries, with filters and the ability to save posts to a reading list.
primary_functions: Display a list of blog posts with titles, dates, excerpts, and tags
Provide tag filters such as a Tour Diary tag and a date or year filter such as 2024
Allow users to save posts to a reading list using a Save, Bookmark, or Add to reading list control
Open full article detail pages when a post title is clicked

incoming_params.description: Tag filter applied to the articles, e.g., 'Tour Diary'.
Publication year filter, e.g., '2024' when listing 2024 Tour Diary posts.
Optional category filter, such as 'news' or 'tour'.
Sorting for blog posts, e.g., 'published_desc' for newest first.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a blog post title or "Read more" link
Click a "Reading List" or "Saved articles" link from the blog sidebar or footer

access_methods.description: Accessible via the "Blog" item in the main navigation

pages.name: Article Detail
pages.description: Full content view for an individual blog/news article, including save-to-reading-list actions.
primary_functions: Display the complete article content with images, title, date, and tags
Allow users to save or unsave the article to or from the reading list
Provide navigation back to the blog index or to the reading list
Encourage further reading with links to related Tour Diary or news posts

incoming_params.description: Article ID to display, selected from the blog index or the reading list.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click "Back to Blog" from the article page
Click a "View Reading List" link after saving an article

access_methods.description: Accessed via article.html?id={articleId} from Blog or Reading List pages

pages.name: Reading List / Saved Articles
pages.description: Page listing all articles the user has saved/bookmarked, with options to open or remove them.
primary_functions: List all posts the user has saved to the reading list, including their titles, dates, and tags
Allow users to open any saved post, such as the first saved Tour Diary 2024 entry, in the article detail page
Provide controls to remove articles from the reading list
Optionally filter the reading list by tag or year for easier management

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on the title of a saved article to open the full article detail page

access_methods.description: Accessible via the "Reading List" link in the footer
Linked from blog and article pages whenever the user interacts with saved posts

pages.name: Newsletter Signup
pages.description: Standalone page containing the band's newsletter signup form with interest and frequency options.
primary_functions: Collect basic subscriber information including name and email address
Allow users to select interests such as tour announcements, new music releases, and exclusive merch offers
Provide controls to choose region or country and set email frequency such as Weekly
Submit the subscription and display a confirmation or success message

incoming_params.description: Optional source indicator for where the user came from when opening the signup page, e.g., 'footer_link_home'.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a "Back to Home" or similar link after successful subscription

access_methods.description: Accessible via the "Newsletter" link in the footer

pages.name: About & Contact
pages.description: Information page about the band including biography, members, contact details, and a small contact form. Also houses privacy/terms content via an anchor section.
primary_functions: Present the band biography, history, and member information
Provide contact options such as a simple contact form or email address for booking or inquiries
Summarize privacy and terms information or link to sections via anchors
Offer additional context about the site, such as store policies or support information

incoming_params.description: Anchor section to scroll to automatically, such as 'privacy_terms' when opened via the footer link.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a "Back to Home" or logo link from the About page

access_methods.description: Accessible via the "About & Contact" and "Privacy & Terms" footer links (with section=privacy_terms)
May be linked from various sections such as the Store or Tour pages for support/booking information

header_links.description: Homepage with quick access to all main sections
Discography and albums overview for browsing tracks
All official music videos and visual media
Tour dates and live show listings with filters
Band store for music, apparel, and other merch
News and blog posts including Tour Diary entries
Overview of user playlists such as Favorites and Workout Mix
View items currently in the shopping cart

footer_links.description: Learn about the band and find contact information
Sign up for email updates on tours, releases, and merch
Access your saved blog and Tour Diary posts
Browse apparel items such as T-shirts and hoodies
Browse music products including digital albums and vinyl
View privacy and terms information for the website
